_comments: This file configures field-level encryption for the MJ: Signature Requests entity.
Field encrypted: Message (the email body sent to recipients with the envelope; may contain
sensitive deal/contract context). Encryption is transparent — GenericDatabaseProvider encrypts
on Save and decrypts on Load via the Base Encryption Key. Mirrors MJ: Credentials.Values.
Run `npx mj sync push --dir=metadata --include="entities"` to apply, then rebuild + restart.
Message field — encrypted at rest. Decryptable in-API so the engine and authorized
clients can read it; the provider receives the cleartext body at send time.
